name: Allen B Davis Park
description: Allen B Davis Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Greenville, MI. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Greenville High School
description: Greenville High School is a place to play pickleball in Greenville, MI. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: The Club Fitness Center
description: The Club Fitness Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Greenville, MI. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
